response.justification: Bogdan is severely over-qualified for this junior/mid-level role. Currently a Staff Software Engineer at re:cinq with 15+ years of experience, he possesses all required technical skills (TypeScript, React, REST APIs, databases, Docker, Kubernetes) and significantly more. The fundamental mismatch in seniority level—applying for entry-level work immediately after staff promotion—combined with likely compensation expectations and risk of rapid departure make this unsuitable despite exceptional technical fit.
strengths: Mastery of required tech stack: 15+ years TypeScript/JavaScript, extensive React and Node.js, fullstack systems across web, mobile, and infrastructure
Demonstrated commitment to clean architecture, TDD, and code quality through open-source projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and mentoring activities
Comprehensive coverage of bonus technologies: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK, SQL/NoSQL databases, and systems handling millions of requests at scale
concerns: Severe seniority mismatch: Staff-level engineer applying for entry-level individual contributor role just weeks after promotion (April 2025)
No domain-specific experience in renewable energy, construction technology, energy consulting, or document workflows
Limited visibility of nice-to-have specializations: no OCR/image recognition work highlighted, MongoDB more prominent than PostgreSQL, no specific AWS services (ECS, EKS, RDS, S3, SQS) mentioned
